## Phase / Step

Which phase or step does your question concern?

- [ ] Phase 0 — Extraction
- [ ] Phase 0.75 — Graph construction
- [ ] Phase 0.9 — Theory hardening
- [ ] Phase 1 — Logical consistency audit
- [ ] Phase 2 — Uniqueness audit
- [ ] Phase 2.5 — Counterexample audit
- [ ] Phase 3 — Formal system qualification
- [ ] General methodology

## Motivation

## Proposed Change (optional)
